allow:
Bash(cat > /dev/null << 'TREEMAP'
Creating a text map of the entire project structure
TREEMAP
find /f/ant-cells-ai-server -type f \\\( -name "*.py" -o -name "*.md" -o -name ".env*" -o -name "*.http" \\\) ! -path "*/.git/*" ! -path "*/__pycache__/*" ! -path "*/.idea/*" | sed 's|/f/ant-cells-ai-server|.|g' | sort)

Bash(cat << 'EOF'
PROJECT STRUCTURE COMPLETE - Displaying Visual Tree Map
EOF)

Bash(cd F:/ant-cells-ai-server && for d in \\
  "app/domains/post" \\
  "app/domains/post/domain" \\
  "app/domains/post/domain/entity" \\
  "app/domains/post/application" \\
  "app/domains/post/application/port" \\
  "app/domains/post/application/request" \\
  "app/domains/post/application/response" \\
  "app/domains/post/application/usecase" \\
  "app/domains/post/adapter" \\
  "app/domains/post/adapter/inbound" \\
  "app/domains/post/adapter/inbound/api" \\
  "app/domains/post/adapter/outbound" \\
  "app/domains/post/adapter/outbound/persistence" \\
  "app/domains/post/infrastructure" \\
  "app/domains/post/infrastructure/orm" \\
  "app/domains/post/infrastructure/mapper" \\
  "app/infrastructure/database"; do
  touch "$d/__init__.py"
done
echo "done")
